summary: Fresh verification shows the worker is finished for this task for now.
reasons: `.plan/TODO.md` has empty In Progress and Blocked sections, and the task is marked done.
Fresh `export PATH="$HOME/.dotnet:$PATH" && dotnet build FoodTrack.sln` succeeded with 0 warnings and 0 errors.
Fresh `export PATH="$HOME/.dotnet:$PATH" && dotnet test FoodTrack.sln` passed all 11 tests.

Fresh live smoke verification on an isolated SQLite database passed: `POST /api/inventory/receive` created `LOT-2026-04-777`, `POST /api/inventory/dispatch` allocated `3` units from FIFO batch `LOT-2026-04-001`, `POST /api/inventory/adjustments` updated the new batch to quantity `30`, and `GET /api/products/{productId}/fifo-batches` reflected the adjusted batch.
The repository still satisfies the finish criteria for an initial end-to-end backend scaffold, now including write-side inventory flows.
instructions_for_worker: No further work is required for this task; wait for the next request.
